title: The Mystery of the Green Garlic
description:
You minced a few cloves of garlic, stirred them into a jar of pickles or a pot of soup, and came back later to find them an alarming shade of blue-green. Not moldy. Not rotten. Just... teal. Like someone swapped your garlic for a crayon.

Chapters:
0:00 BLUE-GREEN GARLIC
0:19 SULFUR COMPOUNDS
0:34 MOLECULAR SCISSORS
0:51 FOUR PYRROLES
1:10 SLIDE ALONG THE RAINBOW
1:37 FRESH GARLIC GREENS MORE
1:58 COMPLETELY SAFE TO EAT
2:15 LABA GARLIC
2:32 GARLIC PAINTED ITSELF
2:59 A TINY CHEMISTRY EXPERIMENT
